zh.Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Strängnäs kn, Söder: 瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額馬爾奧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke於大約1585年出生在瑞典時，他的父親Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke27歲，母親Elin Eriksdotter Kagg31歲。他和Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1640年5月在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.Skänninge, Östergötland, Sweden: 瑞典額斯特格特藍德斯亞寧
zh-hans.Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Strängnäs kn, Söder: 瑞典索德曼藍德特瑟爾額馬爾奧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke于大约1585年出生在瑞典时，他的父亲Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke27岁，母亲Elin Eriksdotter Kagg31岁。他和Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1640年5月在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nils
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: Bengtsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Gunnel, Kerstin, Lars, Per, Sven.  German Hans, Ulrika.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Bengt, Swedish form of Benedict . Compare Bankston , Benson , and Bentson .

variants.name: Bengtson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nils, Algot, Britt, Kjersten, Lars, Nels.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Bengtsson . In some cases this is also an Americanized form of the rare Danish and Norwegian cognate Bengtsen.

variants.name: Bankston
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankson  .
History: Andrew Bankston, alias Anders Bengtsson, came to New Sweden on the Delaware river in 1656; he died in Philadelphia, PA, in 1706.

variants.name: Bengston
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Nels, Nils.

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

variants.name: Bankson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankston  .

historicEvents.description: Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.
Swedish warship Vasa sank in Stockholm harbor. 25 drowned.

historicEvents.title: The Thirty Years' War
historicEvents.description: King Gustavus Adolphus entered Sweden into the Thirty Years' War in 1630 with great success on the side of the German Protestants.

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke was born about 1585, in Sweden, his father, Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke, was 27 and his mother, Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. He died in May 1640, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke est né environ 1585, à Suède, son père, Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. Il est décédé en mai 1640, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke um 1585 in Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke 27 und seine Mutter Elin Eriksdotter Kagg 31. Er hatte mit Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Mai 1640 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke è nato il circa 1585 nel Svezia, il suo padre, Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. Morì nel maggio 1640, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Skänninge, Östergötland, Sweden: スウェーデンoステルグoトランドスクaニンッジ
ja.Mälsåker, Ytterselö, Strängnäs kn, Söder: スウェーデンスoデルマンランドイッテルセルoムaルスaカー
ja.lifeSummary: Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielkeが約1585年にスウェーデンで生まれた時，父Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielkeは27歳，母Elin Eriksdotter Kaggは31歳であった。彼はKerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglingeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1640年5月に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke(이)가 대략 1585년 스웨덴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elin Eriksdotter Kagg(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 5월 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke nasceu aproximadamente 1585, em Suécia, seu pai, Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. Ele faleceu em maio de 1640, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke родился около 1585 г. в местности Швеция, его отцу по имени Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. Он умер май 1640 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Bengtsson Silfverbielke nació aproximadamente 1585, en Suecia, su papá, Bengt Nilsson Silfverbielke, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elin Eriksdotter Kagg, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Kerstin Johansdotter Maneskold Af Seglinge. Murió en mayo de 1640, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
